  "findings": [
    "Staged conductors are undersized for the specified load and run length, which will cause excessive voltage drop and potential overheating."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Reject the staged conductors.",
    "Re-calculate the required conductor size using NEC Table 310.16 ampacity limits and standard voltage drop formulas (limiting drop to 3% for branch circuits or 5% overall).",
    "Procure and stage the correctly sized larger-gauge conductors before allowing installation to begin."
  ],
  "rationale": "The staged conductors are undersized for the combined load and length requirements. Installing them would violate NEC guidelines regarding voltage drop and ampacity, creating a fire hazard and equipment operational issues. Correctly sized conductors must be staged before work begins.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 310",
    "NEC Table 310.16",
    "NEC 210.19(A) Informational Note No. 4 (Voltage Drop)"
  ]
}
